description: anvilml-core: error types and crate-level re-exports
context: Implement crates/anvilml-core/src/error.rs: AnvilError enum with variants ConfigLoad, Io, Json, InvalidGraph, WorkerDead, JobNotFound, ArtifactNotFound, DbError, PrefixedPayloadTooBig. Implement Display + std::error::Error. Add thiserror dependency. Re-export from lib.rs. `cargo test -p anvilml-core` exits 0.

Implement crates/anvilml-core/src/config.rs: ServerConfig, ModelDirConfig, RocmConfig, HardwareOverrideConfig, FrontendConfig (mode: Local|Proxy|Headless), GpuSelectionConfig, LimitsConfig per ANVILML_DESIGN §3.1. All fields have documented defaults. Derive serde Deserialize/Serialize, Clone, Debug. Add serde + toml deps. `cargo test -p anvilml-core -- config` exits 0 with config round-trip test.

description: anvilml-core: domain types — Job, Model, Artifact
context: Implement crates/anvilml-core/src/types/: job.rs (Job, JobStatus, JobSettings, SubmitJobRequest, SubmitJobResponse), model.rs (ModelMeta, ModelKind, DType), artifact.rs (ArtifactMeta). All types derive Serialize, Deserialize, Clone, Debug, utoipa::ToSchema. Add uuid (features: v4, serde), chrono (features: serde), utoipa deps. `cargo test -p anvilml-core -- types` exits 0.

description: anvilml-core: hardware and worker types + WebSocket event types
context: Implement types/hardware.rs (HardwareInfo, GpuDevice, DeviceType, HostInfo, InferenceCaps), types/worker.rs (WorkerInfo, WorkerStatus), types/events.rs (WsEvent enum + all event structs per ANVILML_DESIGN §4.5). Serialize WsEvent as {event, timestamp, ...fields} using serde tag. Re-export all types from anvilml-core lib.rs. `cargo test -p anvilml-core` exits 0 with >=10 tests total.

Implement crates/anvilml-ipc/src/messages.rs: WorkerMessage enum (Ping, Shutdown, InitializeHardware, Execute, CancelJob, MemoryQuery) and WorkerEvent enum (Pong, Ready, Progress, ImageReady, MemoryReport, Completed, Failed, Cancelled, Dying). All variants carry the fields from ANVILML_DESIGN §7.2–7.3. Add rmp-serde, serde deps. `cargo test -p anvilml-ipc -- messages` exits 0.

Implement crates/anvilml-ipc/src/framing.rs: async fn write_frame(writer, msg: &WorkerMessage) and async fn read_frame(reader, max_mib: u32) -> WorkerEvent using 4-byte big-endian u32 length prefix + msgpack. Both functions MUST read/write fully in a loop (pipe reads on Windows frequently return fewer bytes than requested). Enforce max_mib before buffer allocation; return Err on oversize or deser failure. Add tokio (features: io-util) dep. cargo test -p anvilml-ipc -- framing exits 0 with round-trip test and oversize-rejection test.
